data.title: Elm Wealth Debuts ETF With $362 Million In Assets, 75% Devoted To Global Equities
data.description: Elm Wealth turns private fund into ETF, providing a tax-efficient and flexible investment vehicle. Dynamic Index Investing adjusts portfolio for optimal returns.

data.title: $1000 Invested In This Stock 20 Years Ago Would Be Worth This Much Today
CrowdStrike Stock Is Hitting New Highs Thursday: What's Going On?
data.description: CrowdStrike Holdings Inc (NASDAQ:CRWD) shares are hitting new all-time highs on Thursday. The cybersecurity company announced the availability of its Charlotte AI.

data.title: Datadog Q4 Earnings: Margins Shrink, Outlook Lags Expectations
data.description: Datadog (NASDAQ: DDOG) reported Q4 results, with revenue up 25% YoY. Adjusted EPS beat estimates. Q1 outlook slightly below consensus, FY25 outlook lower.

data.title: Hertz Misses On Revenue, Profit As Fleet Shrinks, Costs Weigh
data.description: Hertz Global Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: HTZ) shares fall in premarket after reporting a 6.6% drop in Q4 FY24 sales to $2.04 billion, missing analyst forecasts. The company also posted a decline in average rentable vehicles and revenue per day.
